writeup: With the full 2026 regular season schedule in hand, analysts broke down a demanding slate: five primetime appearances, a Thanksgiving home matchup against Kansas City, and a Christmas Day road trip to Denver. Rookie minicamp concluded at One Bills Drive, with first-round pick TJ Parker drawing early praise from coaches for his motor and football IQ. The Bills also formally announced that 97 Rock WGRF-FM will serve as the team's official flagship radio station for the 2026 season.

articles.title: Buffalo Bills 2026 Schedule — Full breakdown with primetime matchups
New Bills OLB TJ Parker beaming about his new home in Buffalo
Bills announce 97 Rock WGRF-FM as official flagship radio station for 2026
Bills take part in third annual full-team community takeover
